settings.text: Use this simple panel to control how your products appear when they’re out of stock:

1. State – Assign a single state per product (e.g., Preorder, Current, Discontinued/Exiting).

2. Button Label – Type the exact Add-to-Cart text for that state (leave blank to use defaults below).

3. Policy – Choose inventory policy: Allow oversell (keep selling at 0) or Deny oversell (stop at 0).

4. Run Sync – Apply these settings to all active products.

Only products with a defined State here will be updated. Leave State blank to skip.

Reference: Full definitions & messaging: Basis Of All Messaging (Google Doc)

https://docs.google.com/document/d/14Wjxhyjz68yyZrhntiNFOdBGooPI6t05EUhJmsQjK7M/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.j90j38kt3fln

Predefined States & Behavior

1) Preorder

  • preorder-august
  • Allow oversell
  • PREORDER
  • Preorders ship Aug 2025

2) Current

  • State key: current
  • Inventory policy: Allow oversell
  • Inventory > 0
  • ATC label: (leave blank → displays “ADD TO CART”)
  • Message: N/A

3) Discontinued (Exiting)

  • State key: discontinued
  • Inventory policy: Deny oversell
  • Inventory > 0
  • ATC label: (leave blank → “ADD TO CART”)
  • Message: Discontinued Color - Get it now before it's gone (metafield)
